name: Overgrown
desc: Thick grass, vines, or other growths cover this arena, making speed far more difficult.
effect: This _Arena_ is _Rough_. All Size 1 or less creatures have _Soft Cover_. A creature may Attack the Arena; if they deal at least 3 _Slash_ Damage they may create a piece of _Terrain_ that does not have Overgrown. Any effects that Targets the whole Arena and does at least 8 _Slash_ Damage removes Overgrown.

name: Cliff
desc: This arena is a sheer cliff, difficult to climb with few handholds.
effect: While in this _Arena_ creatures are always _Climbing_. If you are _Forcibly Moved_ into this _Arena_ from _High Ground_ you immediately _Fall_, the exact value of which depends on the distance.

name: Gusting
desc: A powerful gust that lasts only a short while.
effect: When this Terrain is applied, remove any [_Cloud_] _Terrain_. Non-Melee Attacks that pass through, originate from this, or target a creature in this _Arena_ automatically decrease their Result by 1 unless they are [_Wind_] or [_Lightning_].

name: High Ground
desc: Elevated terrain that provides an advantage against other foes.
effect: You have a +1 on _Attack Rolls_ against creatures in lower Arenas and may treat yourself as 1 Range closer when attacking them.

name: Ledge
desc: The lip of a cliff, right next to a steep drop.
effect: While in this _Terrain_, you may be _Forcibly Moved_ to an adjacent _Arena_ even if it is not _Forceful_.

name: Veiled
desc: Terrain filled with dust, smoke, mist, or some other obscuring agent.
effect: All creatures in this _Arena_ benefit from _Soft Cover_.

name: Submerged
desc: An underwater position within the arena, providing great protection and the expense of the ability to breathe.
effect: Creatures _Engaged_ with this _Terrain_ benefit from _Cover_ and increase their _Resistance_ to _Fire_ by two steps. However, while here they are always _Swimming_ and are _Suffocating_, and cannot remove it until they are no longer _Engaged_ with this _Terrain_. Additionally, they increase their _Weakness_ to _Lightning_ by two steps.

name: Egg Cluster
desc: A disgusting cluster of Locust Eggs.
destroy: When destroyed, all Locusts within Range 1 of the Egg Cluster become _Enraged_ and _Taunted_, and treat the character that Destroyed the Egg Cluster as the Taunter.
special: When using this Terrain for Cover Locusts will not target you with Ranged Attacks.

name: Stalagmite
desc: A large rock, log, or some other.

name: Stalactite
desc: A large rock, log, or some other.
effect: Only [_Flying_] creatures may _Engage_ this; if they do, they do not lose _Flying_.
destroy: When destroyed, this falls to the ground. Creatures in the _Arena_ must _Negate_ [_Reflex_ 8]; on a failure they are _Hit_, on a success they are instead _Grazed_. This is a [_Stab_, _Earth_] effect. Create four _Source_ 2 [_Earth_].

name: Oil
desc: A slick coat of oil covers this area, making passage difficult.
effect: This _Terrain_ is _Rough_. If this _Terrain_ is _Ignited_, it automatically becomes _Roaring_ and rolls all end of round effects at _Advantage_.

name: Wet
desc: A puddle, slick ground, or other small source of water.
effect: Creatures _Engaged_ with this _Terrain_ have a -1 to _Negate_ against all _Forced Movement_ and _Prone_. Additionally, _Lightning_ Attacks gain a +1 to _Attack Rolls_ against creatures here.
interactions: If this would become _Blazing_, instead remove _Wet_ and add _Veiled_.

name: Cramped
desc: A tight corridor that is difficult to fight in.
effect:
* All creatures and Terrain in this Arena is always _Engaged_.
* _Heavy_ Attacks made while in this _Arena_ have _Disadvantage_.
* Attacks that pass through this _Arena_ have _Disadvantage_.

name: Icy
desc: A slick sheet of ice that makes it difficult to find footing.
effect: This _Terrain_ is _Rough_; additionally, creatures _Engaged_ with this _Terrain_ have _Disadvantage_ to _Negate_ against all _Forced Movement_ and _Prone_.
interactions: If this _Engagement_ or a creature in it is targeted by a _Fire_ effect, this becomes _Wet_.

name: Tripping Hazard
desc: A low protrusion that, most of the time, is easily avoided, but could trip one forced into it.
effect: When a creature becomes _Engaged_ this _Terrain_ due to _Forced Movement_ they fall _Prone_.

name: Spikes
desc: Spikes, spines, or other terrain that can easily impale and shred others.
effect: When a creature becomes _Engaged_ with this _Terrain_ they take 2 _Stab_ Damage.

name: Blazing
desc: A burning piece of terrain that has been ignited.
effect:
When creatures become _Engaged_ with this they take 2 _Fire_ Damage. If they end their _Turn_ _Engaged_, they gain _Alight_ 1. At the end of the _Round_ roll a d6 (_Disadvantage_ if not on _Flammable_ _Terrain_):
* **1-2:** Replace _Blazing_ with _Smoldering_. Adjacent _Flammable_ _Terrain_ loses 1 _Hardness_.
* **3-4:** No change.
* **5-6:** Flames spread. _Ignite_ 1 random _Flammable_ _Terrain_ in Range 0, or the _Arena_ if _Flammable_. If the _Arena_ is Blazing, instead _Ignite_ a random piece of _Flammable_ _Terrain_ in Range 1.
interactions: If this would become _Wet_, it becomes _Smoldering_ and _Wet_ is not applied.
special: Blazing is a _Source_ 3 if applied to an _Arena_. If a _Flammable_ piece of a _Terrain_ is _Destroyed_ any _Terrain_ created is also _Blazing_.

name: Roaring
desc: A piece of terrain covered in intense, roiling flames.
effect:
When creatures become _Engaged_ with this they take 4 _Fire_ Damage. If they end their _Turn_ _Engaged_, they gain _Alight_ 2. At the end of the _Round_ roll a d6 (_Disadvantage_ if not on _Flammable_ _Terrain_):
* **1-2:** Replace _Roaring_ with _Blazing_. If on _Flammable_ _Terrain_, reduce its _Hardness_ by 1.
* **3-4:** No change.
* **5-6:** Flames spread. Ignite 1 random Flammable Terrain in Range 0, or the Arena if Flammable. If the Arena is Roaring, instead Ignite a random piece of Flammable Terrain in Range 1.
special: Roaring is a _Source_ 4 if applied to an _Arena_. If a _Flammable_ piece of a _Terrain_ is _Destroyed_ any _Terrain_ created as a part of that is also _Roaring_.
interactions: If this would become _Wet_, it becomes _Blazing_ and _Wet_ is not applied.

name: Smoldering
desc: A burning piece of terrain that has been ignited.
effect: When creatures become _Engaged_ with this they take 1 _Fire_ Damage.
interactions: If this would become _Wet_, Smoldering is removed and _Wet_ is not applied. The _Terrain_ becomes _Veiled_.
